articles.title: Blood testing is now included in screening recommendations for colon and rectal cancer - KSL.com
articles.description: The American Cancer Society is adding some new testing options to its screening guideline for colorectal cancers – and for the first time, that includes a blood test.
articles.content:
ATLANTA The American Cancer Society is adding some new testing options to its screening guideline for colorectal cancers and for the first time, that includes a blood test.
